channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Street light on pavement sides under the railway arch not working, 14th March
item.description:
Hi, the street light in the railway arch is not working on the pavement. The lights are at the top of the arch - please could the bulbs be replaced?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rotherhithe New Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light on pavement sides under the railway arch not working, 14th March
item.description:
Hi, the street light in the railway arch is not working on the pavement. The lights are at the top of the arch - please could the bulbs be replaced?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rotherhithe New Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Repeated graffiti on cafe, 14th March
item.description:
Repeated graffiti across shutters, wooden façade and front door of café. Being removed by café every few weeks, for it to return immediately.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clarence Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish bags spilled all over street, 14th March
item.description:
Several rubbish bags with food and recycling spilled all over the street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hazelbank Road, Catford South, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wild sycamore sapling sprouting from pavement outside 208 Burrage Road, 14th March
item.description:
Photos taken 14th March 2026. I would remove this before it becomes an expensive problem in a few years.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burrage Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loads of household rubbish, 14th March
item.description:
Fire risk . I am sure you could go through it to find an address

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shawbrooke Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wild sycamore sapling sprouting from pavement opposite 150 Burrage road, 14th March
item.description:
I would remove this before it becomes an expensive problem in a few years. Photos taken 14th March 2026

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burrage Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car Abandoned for months, 14th March
item.description:
The car has been abandoned here for a couple of months in a private residence area. This is within Waverley Place which is gated but some how the person managed to leave their car here

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Adolphus Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wild sycamore sapling growing too large outside 64 Burrage Road, 14th March
item.description:
This wild sycamore sapling is getting too big and is damaging the wall and pavement around it. I would suggest removing now before it becomes even more of an expensive problem in the future. Photos taken 13th March 2026 outside 64 Burrage Road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burrage Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: People fly tipping, 14th March
item.description:
People Throwing rubbish on the floor need to be cleaned and throwing trash in front of a private bin to many mouse around cause of this needs to be sorted

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hoxton Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flowerbeds full of rubbish again, 14th March
item.description:
The flowerbeds and shrubs by the railway bridge, on both sides of Green Lane, are full of litter once more. Bin lids, plastic bags, bottles, etc. It's such a shame as green spaces like these are precious. Can they be added to the street cleaners' regular schedule as they clean the rest of Green Lane please?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fake plant dumped in bush on Burrage road, 14th March
item.description:
Near the Burrage road/ Arthur grove bus stop Photo taken 14th March 2026

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Arthur Grove, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: In front of 18 oxford road, 14th March
item.description:
Bags of clothes and rubbish abandoned

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cambridge Gardens, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Another flytip by the railway bridge, 14th March
item.description:
Box and black bag of rubbish dumped next to the railway bridge on Green Lane, under billboard. Must've happened between 12/3 and 14/3.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large(ish) piece of MDF on pavement, 14th March
item.description:
This has been there for at least 2 weeks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thicket Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Pot Hole, 14th March
item.description:
Large and deep pot hole please arrange to inspect and repair. Thanks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): South Road, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic light, 14th March
item.description:
Traffic light broken off post (see photo)
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 150, Finchley Road, South Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Damage - pole leaning / equipment detached from pole/facing the wrong direction

item.title: Pothole in middle of road, 14th March
item.description:
Pothole

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hainthorpe Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Growing pothole, 14th March
item.description:
There's a growing pothole on Green Dragon Lane on the side travelling away from the roundabout at the World's End Road junction with Green Dragon Lane between the first turning left and Maxim Road.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Dragon Lane, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Roundabout completely destroyed and dangerous, 14th March
item.description:
I’ve reported this before, still no action taken. This is extremely dangerous and needs urgent action
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bickley Park Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
